title: Recurring tasks every 3rd thursday of the month

posts.author: klewis (Karli Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to create recurring task automations where the timing is done by week number and day of week?

Like the subject/title says, “every 3rd Thursday of the month”

I cannot set to be “every month on x day,” because then it will not always fall on Thursday, and I cannot set it to be “every x weeks on Thursday” because then it will not always fall on the third week.

I’ve asked this before and not gotten any solutions or even any workarounds… is there anything I can do to make this happen?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @klewis !

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @klewis ,

We have created the app Recurring Tasks Schedule Pro - monday.com App Marketplace, which lets you configure highly customizable recurrence including your use case (Every 3rd Thursday of the month). See image below for the same.

It has also various other advanced features like

  1. Highly customizable recurrence
  2. Ability to set status, due date, target group on schedule run
  3. Calendar view (to visualize your upcoming tasks on calendar)
  4. Weekday based schedules (2nd Thursday of month, etc)
  5. Custom date based name
  6. Notifications to task assignee
